1_L8H0_functional_phases.phase2_induction: 50M: entropy 2.12, attends to tokens after repeated 'the' (cat, wood)
1_L8H0_functional_phases.phase3_structural: 200M+: entropy <0.75, concentrates on BOS and period tokens
1_L8H0_functional_phases.implication: L8H0 repurposes from induction to structural role during training

2_coreference_specialization.finding: Later models specialize: improve on simple continuations, degrade on cross-clause coreference

3_L8H0_negative_mover.finding: L8H0 DLA goes from ~0 (10M) to -0.135 (1000M) on coreference
3_L8H0_negative_mover.mechanism: At 1000M, L8H0 attends to BOS/period, not induction targets

4_entropy_transition_window.finding: 60M and 100M fill the gap — smooth monotonic decrease, not phase transition

5_A8_null_result.finding: No correlation between L8H0 induction attention and reward (rho=-0.12, p=0.41)
5_A8_null_result.explained_by: L8H0 at 200M+PPO is structural, not induction

6_A6_diversity.finding: BLEU drops from 6.47 (10M) to ~2-3 (50M+), stabilizes. First-token entropy stable ~2.6-3.1

methodology_improvements_over_v4: A5 entropy: 20 diverse prompts instead of 1 (robust to prompt artifacts)
A3 bootstrap: proper resample across 9 probes (Efron 1979), not invalid token-trimming
DLA: ln_final correction + 4 probes averaged (Elhage et al. 2022)
A6: N=50 with seed=42 (v4 had N=20, no seed, inconsistent BLEU)
A8: induction-specific metric (repeated-token attention, not mean attention)
Llama3 scoring via transformers (vLLM deadlocks in Colab with pre-existing CUDA)
